driver_subject: bus: fsl-mc: fsl-mc-allocator: Rework MSI handling
kernel_subject: genirq/msi: Provide interface to retrieve Linux interrupt number
stage1_reason: Change from accessing irq number via msi_desc->irq to using virq field directly, indicating MSI API change in kernel
stage2_reason: Driver commit d86a6d47bcc6 reworks MSI handling to access virq directly, matching kernel commit cf15f43acaad which provides interface to retrieve Linux interrupt number, indicating API change from msi_desc->irq to virq field.
